# 🧠 Issue Template — Local MCP Memory Server

Thanks for taking the time to report an issue or suggest an improvement 🚀

Please fill out the relevant sections below. This helps us diagnose problems faster and maintain a high-quality system.

---

## 📌 Issue Type

Select one:

* [ ] 🐛 Bug Report
* [ ] ✨ Feature Request
* [ ] ⚡ Performance Issue
* [ ] 🧠 MCP / Agent Behavior Issue
* [ ] 📚 Documentation Improvement
* [ ] ❓ Question / Discussion

---

## 📝 Description

Provide a clear and concise description of the issue or idea.

```txt
(What is happening? What do you want to happen?)
```

---

## 🎯 Expected Behavior

Describe what you expected to happen.

```txt
(What should the system do instead?)
```

---

## ❗ Actual Behavior (For Bugs)

What actually happened?

```txt
(Include errors, logs, or unexpected behavior)
```

---

## 🔁 Steps to Reproduce (For Bugs)

1. Go to ...
2. Run command ...
3. Call MCP tool ...
4. Observe error ...

---

## 🧠 MCP Context (IMPORTANT)

If related to MCP behavior, include:

* Agent (e.g., Codex, Roo):
* MCP Tools Used:
* Did `get_agent_instructions` run? (Yes/No)
* Was memory server running? (Yes/No)
* Any MCP errors (e.g., `fetch failed`, handshake issues):

---

## 📦 Environment

* OS: (Windows / Linux / macOS)
* Node.js version:
* MongoDB version:
* Project context (folder name / MCP_PROJECT):
* Running via:

  * [ ] Codex
  * [ ] Roo
  * [ ] CLI
  * [ ] Other

---

## 📄 Logs / Error Output

Paste any relevant logs:

```bash
(paste logs here)
```

---

## 📂 Affected Files (if known)

List files related to the issue:

```txt
- mcp-server.js
- server.js
- logger.js
```

---

## 💡 Proposed Solution (Optional)

If you have an idea for fixing or improving this:

```txt
(Your suggestion here)
```

---

## 🧠 Additional Context

Add anything else that might help:

* screenshots
* architecture notes
* related issues

---

## 🔍 Checklist

Before submitting:

* [ ] I have checked existing issues
* [ ] I have provided enough detail to reproduce the issue
* [ ] I have included logs or error messages (if applicable)
* [ ] I understand MCP requires clean stdout (no logs)

---

## 🚀 Contribution (Optional)

Would you like to work on this issue?

* [ ] Yes, I can submit a PR
* [ ] No, just reporting

---

## 🧠 Final Note

This project is part of a broader vision:

> Building persistent, evolving memory systems for AI agents.

Thanks for helping improve it 💙
